selectedPoints.label: Mission alignment
selectedPoints.description: Keep the change tied to CEO goals, current plan and measurable system impact.

selectedPoints.label: Section objective
selectedPoints.description: Define exactly what Hd central / Ceo / Missions should do better after the upgrade.

selectedPoints.label: Improvement trigger
selectedPoints.description: Preserve the arrow-up trigger and make the generated proposal visible in the brainstorming backlog.

selectedPoints.label: Prompt linkage
selectedPoints.description: Attach the generated prompt to the original brainstorming item with a visible P action.

selectedPoints.label: Status workflow
selectedPoints.description: Support open, selected, in progress, done and archived states for improvement ideas.

selectedPoints.label: Structured artifact
selectedPoints.description: Save title, source section, current state, problems, ideas, impact, tools, agents, steps, priority and status.

selectedPoints.label: Intel storage
selectedPoints.description: Persist analysis selections in INTEL / brainstorming and final prompts in INTEL / brainstorming / prompts.

selectedPoints.label: Popup tabs
selectedPoints.description: Use a compact tabbed popup with checkbox groups for goals, features, data, UX, risks and implementation.

selectedPoints.label: Copy action
selectedPoints.description: Expose a copy button next to the final prompt so it can be reused instantly.

selectedPoints.label: Scope control
selectedPoints.description: Avoid broad redesign and keep the change inside existing architecture and UI patterns.

selectedPoints.label: Missing data fallback
selectedPoints.description: If live data is incomplete, mark assumptions and still produce a safe interim prompt.

selectedPoints.label: API routes
selectedPoints.description: Add server endpoints for listing proposals, creating analyses, saving selections and generating prompts.

selectedPoints.label: Verification
selectedPoints.description: Run lint or build after implementation and document any blocker.
